title: indigofera charlieriana var. scaberrima
intro: Indigofera charlieriana var. scaberrima is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the scabrous indigo bush. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Indigofera charlieriana var. scaberrima include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for use in traditional medicine, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
